name: Attuma
ability: If you have another card here at the end of your turn, destroy this.

name: Bast
ability: On Reveal: Set the Power of all cards in your hand to 3.

name: Black Panther
ability: On Reveal: Double this card’s Power.

name: Darkhawk
ability: Ongoing: +2 Power for each card in your opponent’s deck.

name: Knull
ability: Ongoing: Has the combined Power of all cards destroyed this game.

name: M’Baku
ability: If this is in your deck at the end of the game, it jumps to a random location.

name: Orka
ability: Ongoing: +5 Power if this is your only card here.

name: Sentry
ability: You can’t play this at the right location. On Reveal: Add a -8 Power Void to the right location.

name: Shuri
ability: On Reveal: Double the Power of the next card you play.

name: Silver Surfer
ability: On Reveal: Give your other 3-Cost cards +2 Power.

name: Super-Skrull
ability: Ongoing: Has the Ongoing effects of all enemy cards.

name: Valkyrie
ability: On Reveal: Set ALL cards at this location to 3 Power.
